name: FILTH (US) + XOXO (CH) + THEFALLS (NO) // Live
description:
Brewgata, BRAAK Records and Timeframe Booking present:

Filth (often stylized as FILTH) is a North Carolina-based deathcore band formed in 2015, blending downtempo deathcore, nu-metal, and heavy hip-hop influences, commonly referred to as "gutter gang"

XOXO (often referred to as 8K Violence) is a Swiss hardcore punk band based in Zürich, known for their "Queer & Cute" militant sound and nasty riffs. 

THEFALLS, hailing from Norway, has had an experimental and exploratory approach to metal since 2007. They have found themselves well suited in the space between hardcore, post-metal and sludge. THEFALLS also showcases a frequent use of odd time signatures, distinctive song structures and first-class musical craftsmanship.
